opportunities.title: Security Engineer, Detection and Response
opportunities.description: Who We Are  Notion is the collaborative AI workspace where teams and agents  think together . We're building one place where your knowledge, projects, meetings, and AI tools live side by side, so work feels faster, clearer, and less fragmented. Millions of individuals, small teams, and large companies run their work on Notion.    Notinos (our employees) are customer zero in bringing this future of work to life.
